title: using unpacked array as a module port (and module parameter)

features.name: unpacked array as module parameter
features.description: Code should include a module parameter declared as an unpacked array (logic [W-1:0] name [N-1:0])

features.name: assignment pattern for unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array parameter being assigned via assignment pattern syntax in module instantiation

features.name: generate loop indexing into unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a generate loop where a genvar indexes into an unpacked array parameter

features.name: unpacked array as module port
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array being used as a module port connection
